title: Novag Universal Electronic Chess Board
text: Home * User Interface * Sensory Board * Novag Universal Electronic Chess Board Universal Chess Board with Sapphire II [1] Novag Universal Electronic Chess Board , a wooden chess board with magnetic sensors released by Novag in 1996 as dedicated chess user interface for compatible Novag chess computers such as Novag Super VIP [2] and Novag Sapphire , or for supported commercial chess programs running on a PC . The board was connected via RS-232 serial interface to the serial port of the computer. The PC programs required a start of a provided driver indicating the com port number. Drivers were available for the MS-DOS chess programs Fritz 1-3 , Mephisto Advantage [3] , Genius 3 , Rebel 7 and WChess [4] , and others, later also for engines running under Windows GUIs , such as ChessPartner [5] , WinBoard [6] and Arena .
